build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm run bundle:sidecar

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
